{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bleeding Wand
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Bleeding Wand]] is a two-foot long artifact of Ragnarus consisting of a [[ruby]] core with a dark wooden root.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Bleeding Wand]] is an artifact wielded by [[Adessa]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
